allow: Bash(python -m pytest test_smoke_formal.py -q -k "not integration and not slow" --tb=short)
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from textual.widgets import Static; s = Static\('hello'\); print\([a for a in dir\(s\) if not a.startswith\('__'\)]\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from textual.widgets import Static; s = Static\('hello world'\); print\(type\(s._Static__content\)\); print\(s._Static__content\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -m pytest test_smoke_formal.py -q -k "not integration and not slow" --tb=short)
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from dotenv import dotenv_values, set_key, unset_key; print\('ok'\)")
PowerShell(& ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "import textual.widgets._text_area as ta; import inspect; print\([m for m in dir\(ta.TextArea\) if 'key' in m.lower\(\)]\)")
PowerShell(& ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "import textual.widgets._text_area as ta; print\([m for m in dir\(ta.TextArea\) if not m.startswith\('__'\)][:40]\)")

PowerShell(& ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "import textual.widgets._text_area as ta; print\([m for m in dir\(ta.TextArea\) if 'clear' in m.lower\(\) or 'load' in m.lower\(\) or 'text' in m.lower\(\)]\)")

PowerShell(& ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "import weasyprint; print\('weasyprint ok'\)" 2>&1; & ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "import markdown; print\('markdown ok'\)" 2>&1; & ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "import xhtml2pdf; print\('xhtml2pdf ok'\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(& ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "import reportlab; print\('reportlab', reportlab.__version__\)" 2>&1; & ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "import xhtml2pdf; print\('xhtml2pdf ok'\)" 2>&1; & ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "from fpdf import FPDF; print\('fpdf2 ok'\)" 2>&1)
